title: DebateClaims
description: Atomic claims extracted from a single agent's statement in a debate round.

text.description: One self-contained claim, complete in a single sentence. No filler. No rephrasings of the question.

stance.description: assertion = introducing a position. objection = refuting a peer's prior claim. concession = acknowledging a peer made a valid point.

supportingReason.description: Optional: a single sentence stating the reasoning behind the claim. Omit if the claim is self-evident.
